project.title: Mass spectrometry analysis of cleaved Ycf1p in the monomeric and dimeric states
project.projectDescription: Purified Ycf1p with a C-terminal 3xFLAG tag was obtained from a strain of yeast containing the Pep4p protease. The purified sample was subjected to blue native PAGE. Two gel bands, corresponding to monomeric and dimeric Pep4p-cleaved Ycf1p, were subjected to trypsin digestion.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Purified Ycf1p with a C-terminal 3xFLAG tag was obtained from a strain of yeast containing the Pep4p protease. The purified sample was subjected to b;ue native PAGE. Two gel bands, corresponding to monomeric and dimeric Pep4p-cleaved Ycf1p, were subjected to trypsin digestion.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Tryptic peptides were analyzed via LC MS/MS. Raw MS files were analyzed with Proteome Discoverer software using the S. cerevisiae database and the sequence of Ycf1p-3xFLAG. Modifications included addition of a carbanidomethyl group on Cys (fix), oxidation of Met (variable), acetylation of the N terminus (variable), deamidation of Asn and Gln (variable), and phosphorylation of Ser, Thr, and Tyr.

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: Department of Chemical and Physical Sciences, University of Toronto Mississauga, Canada
labPIs.name: Voula Kanelis

references.referenceLine: Bickers SC, Benlekbir S, Rubinstein JL, Kanelis V. Structure of a dimeric full-length ABC transporter. Nat Commun. 2024 15(1):9946

Characteristics[GeneticModification]: insertion of sequence encoding a C-terminal 3×FLAG tag and a URA3 marker downstream of the YCF1 gene
Characteristics[Specimen]: its membranes were isolated and solubilized with the detergent dodecyl-β-D-maltopyranoside (DDM)
Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: digested with trypsin (0.5 μg) at 37 °C overnight
Characteristics[Modification]: only S903 is highly phosphorylated in the dimeric form of the protein (Supplementary Fig. 9b and Supplementary Data 3, Entries 3424-4042 and Supplementary Data 4, Entries 3082-3444)
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: maximum of three missed cleavage sites

Characteristics[GeneticModification]: insertion of sequence encoding a C-terminal 3×FLAG tag and a URA3 marker downstream of the YCF1 gene
Characteristics[Specimen]: its membranes were isolated and solubilized with the detergent dodecyl-β-D-maltopyranoside (DDM)
Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: digested with trypsin (0.5 μg) at 37 °C overnight
Characteristics[Modification]: S903, S908, T911, and S914 are all heavily phosphorylated in the cleaved Ycf1p monomer
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: maximum of three missed cleavage sites
